body_txt: Usually a Power Trio of secondary characters, if there are three of them, chances are that one will be large and/or fat, one will be skinny, and one will be short. The big one will generally be good-natured , the short one will generally be grumpy , while the thin one generally remains as a middle ground between the two. The tall, thin guy will usually be the leader , the short one will be the brains (unless he's The Napoleon ), and the big guy will be the right-hand or the brawn (unless he's Large and in Charge ). Compare Beauty, Brains, and Brawn , and Nice, Mean, and In-Between for other contrasting trios (and they may overlap with this trope to add more character delineation). Sister Trope to Fat and Skinny and Big Guy, Little Guy . Compare with Terrible Trio , which is usually composed of two "skinny" members (one male, one female) and one "short" one; interestingly, with this dynamic, the "big" would either be Evil Is Bigger or a Fat Bastard , the "thin" is obviously Lean and Mean , and the "short" is The Napoleon , a Depraved Dwarf or (to an extent) Mister Big .
